verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm reaching for the prize, I'm giving everything, I give my life for this, It's what I live for Nothing will keep me from, All that You have for me, You hold my head up high I live for You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Greater is He that's living in me, Than he that is in the world.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Faith I can move the mountain, I can do all things through Christ, I know, Faith standing and believing, I can do all things through Christ, Who strengthens me.
